; ; NOSA HEADER START ; ; The contents of this file are subject to the terms of the NASA Open ; Source Agreement (NOSA), Version 1.3 only (the "Agreement"). You may ; not use this file except in compliance with the Agreement. ; ; You can obtain a copy of the agreement at ; docs/NASA_Open_Source_Agreement_1.3.txt ; or ; https://cdaweb.gsfc.nasa.gov/WebServices/NASA_Open_Source_Agreement_1.3.txt. ; ; See the Agreement for the specific language governing permissions ; and limitations under the Agreement. ; ; When distributing Covered Code, include this NOSA HEADER in each ; file and include the Agreement file at ; docs/NASA_Open_Source_Agreement_1.3.txt. If applicable, add the ; following below this NOSA HEADER, with the fields enclosed by ; brackets "[]" replaced with your own identifying information: ; Portions Copyright [yyyy] [name of copyright owner] ; ; NOSA HEADER END ; ; Copyright (c) 2024 United States Government as represented by the ; National Aeronautics and Space Administration. No copyright is claimed ; in the United States under Title 17, U.S.Code. All Other Rights Reserved. ; ; ;+ ; This class is an IDL representation of the AdditionalMetadata element from ; the ; <a href="https://cdaweb.gsfc.nasa.gov/">Coordinated Data Analysis System</a> ; (CDAS) XML schema. ; ; @copyright Copyright (c) 2024 United States Government as represented ; by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration. No ; copyright is claimed in the United States under Title 17, ; U.S.Code. All Other Rights Reserved. ; ; @author B. Harris ;- ;+ ; Creates an SpdfAdditionalMetadata object. ; ; @param type {in} {type=string} ; type of metadata. ; @param url {in} {type=string} ; URL to additional metadata. ; @returns reference to an SpdfAdditionalMetadata object. ;- function SpdfAdditionalMetadata::init, $ type, url compile_opt idl2 self.type = type self.url = url return, self end ;+ ; Performs cleanup operations when this object is destroyed. ;- pro SpdfAdditionalMetadata::cleanup compile_opt idl2 end ;+ ; Gets the type value. ; ; @returns type value. ;- function SpdfAdditionalMetadata::getType compile_opt idl2 return, self.type end ;+ ; Gets the URL value. ; ; @returns URL value. ;- function SpdfAdditionalMetadata::getUrl compile_opt idl2 return, self.url end ;+ ; Prints a textual representation of this object. ;- pro SpdfAdditionalMetadata::print compile_opt idl2 print, 'type: ', self.type print, 'url: ', self.url end ;+ ; Defines the SpdfAdditionalMetadata class. ; ; @field type type of additional metadata. ; @field url URL to additional metadata. ;- pro SpdfAdditionalMetadata__define compile_opt idl2 struct = { SpdfAdditionalMetadata, $ type:'', $ url:'' $ } end
